channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: PM Modi Sweden Visit LIVE: PM Modi To Visit Sweden Today On Third Leg Of Five-Nation Tour
item.description: PM Modi in Netherlands LIVE Updates: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is on a five-nation tour from May 15 to 20, during which he visited the United Arab Emirates as part of the first leg of the visit.
item.content:encoded: PM Modi in Netherlands LIVE Updates: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is on a five-nation tour from May 15 to 20, during which he visited the United Arab Emirates as part of the first leg of the visit.

item.title: ICE Deported Woman Without 2-Year-Old Son, Then Blamed Her After He Was Killed

media:content.media:description: Orlin Josue Hernandez Reyes, who was living with his uncle, was found murdered

item.description: According to officials, the child suffered multiple broken ribs, a transected pancreas, burns on his body, and signs of possible sexual abuse
item.content:encoded: According to officials, the child suffered multiple broken ribs, a transected pancreas, burns on his body, and signs of possible sexual abuse

item.title: Georgia University Student Jumps Off Popular Cliff To Celebrate Graduation, Dies

media:content.media:description: Authorities said the lake drops at least another 70 feet below that ledge (File)

item.description: Jayden Barreto was celebrating graduation with friends at the lake, a spot the website describes as a “must-do jump for adrenaline junkies and thrill seek
item.content:encoded: Jayden Barreto was celebrating graduation with friends at the lake, a spot the website describes as a “must-do jump for adrenaline junkies and thrill seek

item.title: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Tehran Prepares "Mechanism" For Hormuz Traffic, Israel Strikes Lebanon

media:content.media:description: US Iran War News LIVE Updates

item.description: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War News LIVE Updates: Israel launched a massive series of airstrikes on southern Lebanon, despite an extension of the truce between the two countries.

item.title: FBI Jet, $35,000 Suite Date, Pearl Harbour Snorkel: Kash Patel Faces Heat

media:content.media:description: Kash Patel's girlfriend Alexis Wilkins is provided full-time security detail.

item.description: Several travels and related arrangements made on Kash Patel's orders included his girlfriend Alexis Wilkins, including a closed-door meeting on drug trafficking in Pennsylvania last month.
item.content:encoded: Several travels and related arrangements made on Kash Patel's orders included his girlfriend Alexis Wilkins, including a closed-door meeting on drug trafficking in Pennsylvania last month.

item.title: Nepal's Kami Rita Climbs Mount Everest For 32nd Time, Breaking His Own Record

media:content.media:description: Kami Rita had climbed Mt. Everest for the first time in 1994 (File)

item.description: The 56-year-old veteran climber reached the 8,849-metre peak at 10:12 am on Sunday, according to the Department of Tourism.
item.content:encoded: The 56-year-old veteran climber reached the 8,849-metre peak at 10:12 am on Sunday, according to the Department of Tourism.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The Beijing Spectacle And The Recalibration Of Global Power
item.description: For the world's middle powers, including India, the solidification of Washington and Beijing's duopoly presents an acute, existential dilemma.
item.content:encoded: For the world's middle powers, including India, the solidification of Washington and Beijing's duopoly presents an acute, existential dilemma.

item.title: Reality Show Survivor Greece Stops Filming After Contestant Loses 'Part Of Leg' In Boat Accident

media:content.media:description: He remains hospitalised in serious but stable condition.

item.description: The contestant sustained severe injuries to his legs from the vessel's outboard engine propellers.
item.content:encoded: The contestant sustained severe injuries to his legs from the vessel's outboard engine propellers.

item.title: Family Emergency Kit, Air Raids: Cuba's 'Guide' On 'Potential Enemy Attacks'

media:content.media:description: The document comes as the island of 9.6 million inhabitants is rocked by a socio-economic crisis.

item.description: Cuba has posted a "family guide" on provincial websites on how to survive "potential enemy attacks," as the communist-run island reels from...
item.content:encoded: Cuba has posted a "family guide" on provincial websites on how to survive "potential enemy attacks," as the communist-run island reels from...

item.title: SriLankan Airlines Accuses Indian Staff At Chennai Office Of 2.2 Crores Fraud

media:content.media:description: The airline did not specify the duration of the misappropriation

item.description: In a statement issued on Saturday, the Sri Lankan flag carrier said that the fraud was carried out by altering invoices, payment details and signatures.
item.content:encoded: In a statement issued on Saturday, the Sri Lankan flag carrier said that the fraud was carried out by altering invoices, payment details and signatures.

item.title: Beef Ribs To 'Heavenly' Walk: Xi-Trump Summit Symbolism Underscored US Power, Chinese Tradition

media:content.media:description: For Trump and the American delegation, the summit offered a lesson in Chinese traditions.

item.description: The formal choreography began at Beijing's Great Hall of the People, where the two leaders exchanged views on the Iran conflict, the war in Ukraine and the Korean Peninsula, among other items.
item.content:encoded: The formal choreography began at Beijing's Great Hall of the People, where the two leaders exchanged views on the Iran conflict, the war in Ukraine and the Korean Peninsula, among other items.

item.title: Big Risks And Rewards In Upcoming IPOs At SpaceX, OpenAI, Anthropic

media:content.media:description: Both OpenAI and Anthropic have warned investors against unauthorised securities.

item.description: SpaceX is targeting an initial public offering that would raise up to $80 billion, roughly double the funds generated from all 2025 IPOs.
item.content:encoded: SpaceX is targeting an initial public offering that would raise up to $80 billion, roughly double the funds generated from all 2025 IPOs.

item.title: Bangladesh Seeks New Ganges Treaty, Says Ties With India "Will Depend On It"

media:content.media:description: The Ganges, known as Padma after entering Bangladesh, is a major river system in the nation

item.description: The Indo-Bangladesh Ganges Water Sharing Treaty, signed in 1996, is due to expire in December.
item.content:encoded: The Indo-Bangladesh Ganges Water Sharing Treaty, signed in 1996, is due to expire in December.

item.title: Who Is Raul Castro, Cuban Leader Facing US Indictment

media:content.media:description: Raul Castro last appeared in public on May 1 for International Workers' Day.

item.description: Former Cuban President Raul Castro, the 94yearold brother of revolutionary leader Fidel Castro, could be indicted by the United States in connection with Cuba's deadly 1996
item.content:encoded: Former Cuban President Raul Castro, the 94yearold brother of revolutionary leader Fidel Castro, could be indicted by the United States in connection with Cuba's deadly 1996

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Biggest Takeaway From BRICS Meet? Nobody Knows What It Is Anymore
item.description: Iran and the UAE's competing regional calculations bring into sharp focus the limitations of the grouping.
item.content:encoded: Iran and the UAE's competing regional calculations bring into sharp focus the limitations of the grouping.

item.title: WHO Declares Global Emergency After Congo Ebola Deaths, No Vaccine Yet

media:content.media:description: Doctors Without Borders said it was preparing a "large-scale response".

item.description: An Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo has killed more than 80 as authorities warned there was no vaccine for the strain in a crisis that the World Health Organization...
item.content:encoded: An Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo has killed more than 80 as authorities warned there was no vaccine for the strain in a crisis that the World Health Organization...

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Trump's Beijing Summit Leaves The Rest Asking: Who Will Stop China Now?
item.description: As of now it seems Trump is willing to 'give' on issues important to China. But he is also waiting for something
item.content:encoded: As of now it seems Trump is willing to 'give' on issues important to China. But he is also waiting for something

item.title: Spacecraft To Probe How Earth Fends Off Raging Solar Winds

media:content.media:description: Solar wind is a stream of charged particles shot out from the Sun.

item.description: Particularly fierce solar storms can knock out satellites, threaten astronauts - and create colourful auroras in the skies of northern and southern latitudes.
item.content:encoded: Particularly fierce solar storms can knock out satellites, threaten astronauts - and create colourful auroras in the skies of northern and southern latitudes.

item.title: Elon Musk Wants SpaceX To Go Public: How It Works

media:content.media:description: SpaceX is expected to file its S-1 this week, according to a source close to the matter.

item.description: The trickiest part may be settling on a share price - the cost of one piece of ownership in the company when it first hits the market.
item.content:encoded: The trickiest part may be settling on a share price - the cost of one piece of ownership in the company when it first hits the market.

item.title: Qantas Flight Diverted After Man Bites Flight Attendant

media:content.media:description: The flight from Melbourne was headed to Dallas.

item.description: The man was met by local authorities on arrival and has been slapped with a no fly ban on all Qantas planes.
item.content:encoded: The man was met by local authorities on arrival and has been slapped with a no fly ban on all Qantas planes.
